name: env_continuity_dedup_stationary
description: Stays in place for 10 turns in a town, measuring environmental fact bloat. Player does not move — narrator re-describes the same scene each turn. Tests whether injection-time dedup collapses near-duplicate env phrasings. Expected: env fact count in continuity packet stays under 12 after 10 turns. Pre-patch baseline would saturate at 20 with ~65% redundancy.
world_prompt: The world feels like a whimsical but unsettling small town caught in a perpetual, slightly frayed 1950s aesthetic—where picket fences and neon diner signs hide a reality that bends to the whims of casual conversation.

turns.action: I begin inside a small town. The street is quiet. I stand on the pavement outside a row of shops.
